title: Game Menu Mod Option
description: MOD settings to the game menu as before 1.12.2
body:
# GameMenuModOption

Added MOD settings to the game menu as before 1.12.2
![Image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/393/357/2021-09-07_02.png)

Forge update notification function has been added as a change from the MOD button before 1.12.2  
This function can be switched from the config.  
![Image](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/358878159615164416/1050635889887416380/2022-12-09_13h50_17.png)

Added [ModMenu](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modmenu) Style since v2.0.0  
It can be enabled in the config.  
![Image](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/358878159615164416/1050636929391153203/2022-12-09_13.55.38.png)

Forge will add the mod button without installing this mod after the following versions.
 
MC1.20.1 - 47.1.25  
MC1.19.4 - 45.1.15  
MC1.19.2 - 43.2.20  

The main functionality of this mod is no longer needed, but the mod update notification display and the ability to return the mod button to the same location as before exist, so we will continue to update it.


## ModPack
Please use it freely.
